latestIgtvVideos.title: National Lipstick Day with @GiselCalvillo
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Wearing:
Powder Kiss Velvet Blur Slim Stick
in Devoted to Danger
Lip Pencil in Cherry

Today, on #Juneteenth, we invite you to hear about how our global community of Black Artists, creators and leaders are honouring this historic moment for the Black community. We remain committed to advocating for racial justice and equality all year long and would love to learn more about how you are taking time to reflect on this important day.

🖤@brich_beauty
🖤@theebritfactor
🖤@romerojennings
🖤@ravensimone.__

Going away for Memorial Day? Take us with you! Pack #MiniMAC must-haves to keep your look on lock all weekend long:

☀️M·A·CStack Mascara / Mini M·A·C
☀️Lipstick / Mini M·A·C
☀️Lipglass Clear / Mini M·A·C
☀️Pigment / Mini M·A·C
☀️Fix+ / Mini M·A·C

We’ve got the range! Explore our collection of 12 hi-def, technicolour shades fused with Pigment Alchemy for potent, single-swipe payoff to deliver bold, rich colour with every stroke. #MACColourExcess #Regram @peace_love_alicia

When they say the dress code is Business Casual 💄. Effortlessly illuminate lips with sheer, warm red shine in a glossy glide with Lustreglass Lipstick in Business Casual. #MACLustreglass #Regram: @nutslipstickmix

latestIgtvVideos.title: MAC STACK LAUNCH with @giselcalvillo
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
How to MAC STACK ✨
Using:
Skin:
Studio Fix 24 hr concealer 
Mineralized skinfinish Natural Medium Tan
Blush: Pinch Me 

Eyes:
Crease/lower lashline: Sandstone eyeshadow 
Brushstroke brushblack liner
Mascara: MAC STACK used Mega and micro brush 

Lips: Stripdown lip pencil and Date maker powderkiss liquid lipstick

latestIgtvVideos.caption:

🖤Extended Play Gigablack Lash

latestPosts.caption:
MORE iconic. LESS plastic*. Take a BTS look at how we powered up #MACStudioFix Powder Plus Foundation with Executive Director of M·A·C Product Design, Yeon Roh. Each compact reduces plastic by 45% after refill purchase*.

*After having purchased a refillable compact plus one refill.
Why did this make me emotional? @thelipsticklesbians explore the history of our legendary #MACLipglass at the #MACArchives.
It's always "show me the boots" and never "tell me about your roots". Watch the @thelipsticklesbians raided the #MACArchives (unsupervised). #MACVIVAGLAM

Now take a picture of me AFTER finding out #MACStudioFix dropped the price to $39. Find yourself in our widest range of 78 blur-matte shades that: 

✔️Perfectly match 1:1 with your fave Studio Fix Fluid SPF 15 hue (FINALLY!)
✔Deliver customizable medium-to-full coverage with 24HR oil control.
✔️Do not look grey on any skin tone; with 12 hours of stay-true colour

latestPosts.caption: It's about time. @thelipsticklesbians have entered the #MACStudioFix chat...and the #MACArchives. Follow @thelipsticklesbians to see what went down today at 11am est.

HELLO? OIL CONTROL! @danna calls on #MACStudioFix Powder Plus Foundation for 24 hours of oil + shine control with a blur-matte finish. Danna wears shade NC17, hbu? OH...did we mention it now comes at a lower price, too? ($39).
